message:
fix: wl claim/post/done use wasteland config handle instead of workspace name

GetTownName returned the workspace directory name ("gt") and GetRigHandle
fell back to DOLTHUB_ORG or the directory basename — neither is the
registered wasteland handle. All three wl commands now read RigHandle
from mayor/wasteland.json (set during gt wl join) so posted_by and
claimed_by fields use the correct registered handle (e.g. "steveyegge").

Removes now-unused doltserver.GetRigHandle().

Closes gt-wmdlc0.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
